name: drupal-quick/drupal-quick
description: Unified site scaffolding via Starterkits and Recipes with Tailwind/Vite skinning compilation pipeline.

suggest.drupal/core-recipe-unpack: Required in the consumer project for recipe Composer dependencies to be unpacked into the project's own composer.json.

repositories._comment: Root-only (ignored when this package is a dependency); lets `composer install` resolve the starterkit for development.
